entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's product/company, discussed as naturally suited to slow-burn hiring contexts

entities.name: Getro
entities.context: VC portfolio job board platform (formerly Monday VC) that centralizes roles for portfolio companies

entities.name: Slow-burn hiring
entities.context: Hiring context where there is no urgency; identified as Careerspan's natural fit

entities.name: Panic-hire mode
entities.context: Urgent hiring context where friction in the product becomes a blocker

entities.name: VC / Portco Job Board Integration
entities.context: Pattern of integrating with VC portfolio job boards to address VC-side candidate sourcing needs

entities.name: Integration pattern
entities.context: Proposed approach: propagate roles from Careerspan out to Getro, funnel applications back through Careerspan

relationships.context: Theron exemplifies panic-hire mode due to funding contingent on filling a role
